parameters.name: verificationStatus
parameters.description: Filter by verification status (PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by tax code, brand name, legal name, or email

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in ISO format

profile.description: Optional profile data to create alongside the account

taxCode.description: Tax code of the business (unique identifier)

provinceId.description: UUID of the province (from Location tree)

districtId.description: UUID of the district (from Location tree)

wardId.description: UUID of the ward (from Location tree)

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number for the business

frontImgUrl.description: URL to front image of ID document

backImgUrl.description: URL to back image of ID document

isAuthorizedUser.description: Whether the legal representative is the authorized user

authLetterDocUrl.description: URL to authorization letter document (required if isAuthorizedUser is false)

idNumber.description: ID number (9 or 12 digits for Vietnam)

accountId.description: ID of the created partner account

businessEntityId.description: ID of the created business entity

access_token.description: JWT access token for immediate authentication

refresh_token.description: JWT refresh token for obtaining new access tokens

email.description: The email of the admin/partner user

password.description: The password of the admin/partner user

refresh_token.description: Refresh token obtained from login or previous refresh

survey.description: Stored survey payload or null if none
Arbitrary survey payload. Example structure below.

data.description: List of all available business types

legalName.example: CÔNG TY TNHH SPA HÀ NỘI

documents.description: List of documents with their status

idNumber.description: ID number (9 or 12 digits for Vietnam)

documents.description: List of documents to update or upload

uploadUrl.description: Presigned URL for uploading the file

key.description: Storage key for the uploaded file

url.description: Public or signed URL for the file

branchId.description: Branch ID the employee belongs to
Branch ID the employee belongs to
Branch ID the employee belongs to

doctorProfile.description: Doctor profile data if role is DOCTOR

therapistProfile.description: Therapist profile data if role is THERAPIST

parentId.description: Parent category ID for hierarchical structure
Parent category ID for hierarchical structure

serviceDefinition.description: Service definition (required if type is service)

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary employee

serviceDefinition.description: Service definition (required if type is service)

documentId.description: UUID of the document (if type is DOCUMENT)

fieldName.description: Name of the field (if type is FIELD)

isValid.description: Mark the item as valid or invalid

decision.description: Overall decision on the partner profile

items.description: List of specific items (fields or documents) with their validation status
